name: zoon
description: Agent-native collaborative documents for Codex. Read and write Zoon markdown docs over plain HTTP, with AI-authored text visible in the document.

interface.shortDescription: Write long Codex output into collaborative Zoon docs
interface.longDescription: Zoon lets Codex collaborate in online markdown documents over plain HTTP. Use it when a user shares a Zoon URL, asks to push a plan/spec/article into Zoon, or wants long structured output in an editable collaborative document instead of chat.
defaultPrompt: Write this plan into a new Zoon doc
Push long structured output to Zoon
